message:
test: add 4 C4 diagram conformance fixtures (Container, Component, Dynamic, Deployment)

Completes conformance test coverage for all 24 documented diagram types.
Adds fixtures for C4Container, C4Component, C4Dynamic, and C4Deployment
diagrams, validating parse counts and SVG rendering.

Total conformance tests: 26 (covering all diagram families)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+C4Component
+    title Component diagram
+    Container_Boundary(api, "API") {
+        Component(ctrl, "Controller", "Rust", "Handles requests")
+        Component(svc, "Service", "Rust", "Business logic")
+        Component(repo, "Repository", "Rust", "Data access")
+    }
+    Rel(ctrl, svc, "Calls")
+    Rel(svc, repo, "Uses")

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+C4Container
+    title Container diagram
+    Person(user, "User", "A person using the system")
+    Container_Boundary(c1, "Main System") {
+        Container(web, "Web App", "React", "The frontend")
+        Container(api, "API", "Rust", "The backend")
+        ContainerDb(db, "Database", "PostgreSQL", "Stores data")
+    }
+    Rel(user, web, "Uses")
+    Rel(web, api, "Makes API calls")
+    Rel(api, db, "Reads/writes")

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+C4Dynamic
+    title Dynamic diagram
+    Person(user, "User", "A person")
+    Container(web, "Web App", "React", "Frontend")
+    Container(api, "API", "Rust", "Backend")
+    Rel(user, web, "1. Opens app")
+    Rel(web, api, "2. Fetches data")
+    Rel(api, web, "3. Returns data")

@@ -658,5 +658,110 @@
         "organized in 6 groups"
       ]
     }
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "c4container_basic",
+    "description": "C4 Container diagram with system boundary and containers.",
+    "input_path": "fixtures/frankentui_conformance/c4container_basic.mmd",
+    "source_refs": [
+      "/dp/frankentui/crates/ftui-extras/src/mermaid.rs:c4_parser"
+    ],
+    "expected": {
+      "diagram_type": "C4Container",
+      "warnings": {
+        "exact_count": 0
+      },
+      "counts": {
+        "nodes": 4,
+        "edges": 3,
+        "clusters": 1,
+        "subgraphs": 1
+      },
+      "svg_contains": [
+        "User",
+        "Web App",
+        "API",
+        "Database"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "c4component_basic",
+    "description": "C4 Component diagram with container boundary and components.",
+    "input_path": "fixtures/frankentui_conformance/c4component_basic.mmd",
+    "source_refs": [
+      "/dp/frankentui/crates/ftui-extras/src/mermaid.rs:c4_parser"
+    ],
+    "expected": {
+      "diagram_type": "C4Component",
+      "warnings": {
+        "exact_count": 0
+      },
+      "counts": {
+        "nodes": 3,
+        "edges": 2,
+        "clusters": 1,
+        "subgraphs": 1
+      },
+      "svg_contains": [
+        "Controller",
+        "Service",
+        "Repository"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "c4dynamic_basic",
+    "description": "C4 Dynamic diagram with numbered interactions.",
+    "input_path": "fixtures/frankentui_conformance/c4dynamic_basic.mmd",
+    "source_refs": [
+      "/dp/frankentui/crates/ftui-extras/src/mermaid.rs:c4_parser"
+    ],
+    "expected": {
+      "diagram_type": "C4Dynamic",
+      "warnings": {
+        "exact_count": 0
+      },
+      "counts": {
+        "nodes": 3,
+        "edges": 3,
+        "clusters": 0,
+        "subgraphs": 0
+      },
+      "svg_contains": [
+        "User",
+        "Web App",
+        "API",
+        "Opens",
+        "Fetches"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "c4deployment_basic",
+    "description": "C4 Deployment diagram with deployment nodes and infrastructure.",
+    "input_path": "fixtures/frankentui_conformance/c4deployment_basic.mmd",
+    "source_refs": [
+      "/dp/frankentui/crates/ftui-extras/src/mermaid.rs:c4_parser"
+    ],
+    "expected": {
+      "diagram_type": "C4Deployment",
+      "warnings": {
+        "exact_count": 0
+      },
+      "counts": {
+        "nodes": 2,
+        "edges": 1,
+        "clusters": 3,
+        "subgraphs": 3
+      },
+      "svg_contains": [
+        "AWS",
+        "EC2",
+        "RDS",
+        "API Server",
+        "Database"
+      ]
+    }
   }
 ]
